title: Cheers in Czech
description: The whole team must toast 'Na zdraví!' with eye contact. No eye contact, drink again.

title: Local intel
description: Ask a stranger (politely) for their favourite pub in Prague. Get a photo with them.

title: Beer mat flip
description: Each team member must flip and catch a beer mat off the table edge. Three attempts each.

title: Accent challenge
description: Order your next round in your best Czech accent. The barperson decides if it passed.

title: Group photo
description: Recreate a classic boy-band album cover with the whole team.

title: Toast the stag
description: Compose and deliver a one-line toast to the absent stag. Film it and send to the group chat.
